hero.kicker: a player profile, in three acts
hero.intro: Read your Steam library the way a friend who actually plays would. Three quiet chapters — what you love, what's been waiting, and the types you've quietly outgrown.

entry1.title: sign in with steam
entry1.subtitle: via OpenID — your browser's current Steam session decides who.

entry2.title: enter a steam id
entry2.subtitle: profile URL, SteamID64, or vanity name — must be public.

entry3.title: try a sample player
entry3.subtitle: 26 games · roguelite-leaning · a few buyer's-remorse picks · no Steam account needed.

errors.authFailed: Steam login didn't come back. Try paste mode or the sample below.

footer.privacyBody: Profile and game details must be public. Libraries are fetched live per request, never stored.
footer.howBody: TF-IDF tag similarity layered with a self-trained 50-d PPMI embedding and HDBSCAN clustering. All numpy, no LLM.
footer.colophonPrefix: Set in Pixelify Sans and Hanken Grotesk.

taste.kicker: act i · your taste in one sentence
taste.fallbackSentence: Your taste profile is taking shape.

footer.nextHint: Recommendations grounded in this taste profile.

intros.new: Ranked by taste similarity against your library. Excludes anything already in your collection. Each pick comes with its evidence — the games of yours that contributed most to the match.
intros.owned: Games you already bought but barely started, ranked by how well they fit your current taste. Steam won't show you this list — finishing what you own doesn't drive their revenue.

fresh_fit.label: fresh fit
fresh_fit.hint: best fit, biased toward newer titles

empty.newBody: Try a different ranking, or check back after your library updates.
empty.ownedBody: No untouched games matched the fit filter. Either you finish what you buy, or you've stopped buying.

intros.mixed: You already found your favorites in these genres, then kept buying more. Same itch, but the original still scratches it best — the new ones sit unstarted.
intros.pure: Genres where nothing stuck. You buy them, you try them, you don't finish them. Future-you will thank present-you for noticing the pattern.
intros.sleeping: Owned but barely touched. Each listed below has fewer than 30 minutes of playtime.

empty.mixedBody: When you fall for a genre, you stick with the originals. Healthy.
empty.pureBody: Every type you buy, you actually play. That's rare.
empty.sleepingBody: Nothing in your library has less than 30 minutes — you start what you buy.

loading.body: First read takes 5-10 seconds. After that, repeat visits to the same account are cached and return immediately.

recs.label: generating recommendations
recs.detail: cosine sim · exclude owned · quality filter
